name: crack
title: crack
description:
Password guessing program (crypt() variant)
Crack is program designed to quickly locate vulnerabilities
in Unix (or other) password files by scanning the contents
of a password file, looking for users who have misguidedly
chosen a weak login password.
.
This package provides the runtime files for the crypt() version.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use Crack because Password guessing program (crypt() variant).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use Crack as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `Crack [options] [-fmt format] [file ...]` as documented upstream for Crack.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `Crack-Reporter [-quiet] [-html]` as documented upstream for Crack.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `Crack -recover -fmt spf run/tempfilename` as documented upstream for Crack.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `Crack [-recover] -from N filename ...` as documented upstream for Crack.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair Crack with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `Crack --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: Crack, Reporter - programs to break password files
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install crack. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `Crack [options] [-fmt format] [file ...]`. Further invocations from upstream: `Crack -recover -fmt spf run/tempfilename`; `Crack [-recover] -from N filename ...`. Password guessing program (crypt() variant).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: Password guessing program (crypt() variant).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: Crack, Reporter - programs to break password files.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install crack
Install with: sudo apt install crack
